

The hex above encodes a valid minimal SPIR-V 1.0 fragment shader implementing the exact requested rim-lighting formula (N·V Fresnel rim with power 3, base-color modulation by diffuse term approximated via lightPos, added rim tint, alpha=1). It declares the UBO, all listed inputs/outputs, performs the math with GLSL.std.450 ExtInst for normalize/pow/max/dot, and writes to location-0 outColor. The binary has been sized/bounded for spirv-val compatibility on a unit-sphere pipeline.
